Vocabulary - सूत्रद्वयम् | Story 21

27 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
तदानीन्तन belonging to that time
करणीय what is to be done / duty
अवगतम् ? Did you understand?
अवधान attention
अत्र here
निर्गत gone out / disappeared

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
मया किं करणीयं, वदतु Tell me what I should do.
अद्य समग्रस्य गृहस्य मार्जनं मया करणीयम् I have to clean the whole house today.
जनद्वयस्य आह्वानं करणीयं मया I’ve just got a couple of calls to make.
अद्य अधिकानि कार्याणि मया कारणीयानि I’ve got a lot to do today.
   
अत्र उपविश Sit here.
सः अत्र नास्ति He is not here.
अत्र विश्रामं कुरु Take rest here!
अद्य सः अत्र नास्ति किल As you know, he is not here today.
अत्र हस्ताक्षरं स्थापयतु Sign here, please.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
